abilities.effect:
This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during strong sunlight.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

abilities.shortEffect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× but costs 1/8 max HP after each turn during strong sunlight.
abilities.effect: During strong sunlight, this Pokémon has 1.5× its Special Attack but takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage after each turn.

abilities.shortEffect: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
abilities.effect:
This Pokémon's remaining sleep turn count falls by 2 rather than 1.

If this Pokémon's sleep counter is at 1, it will fall to 0 and then the Pokémon will wake up.
